titleZh: 新公司法时代，外资公司最需关注和应对的几大问题
titleEn: Key Issues Foreign-Invested Companies Should Focus on and Address in the New Company Law Era
abstractZh: 从外商投资企业过渡安排、章程与合资合同调整、治理结构改造以及股东与董事权限配置等方面，梳理新《公司法》对外资公司架构与运营的直接影响。
abstractEn: Reviews transition issues for foreign-invested companies, including charter updates, governance redesign, shareholder arrangements, and operational compliance under the revised Company Law.
